pages.conferenceDesc: Request a conference or event quote
pages.bookDesc: Check availability and reserve your stay

meta.siteDescription: Comfortable rooms, conference spaces and memorable celebrations at Highbury Lounge in Kadoma, Zimbabwe.

home.heroTitle: Where every stay becomes a story.
home.heroText: Comfortable rooms, beautiful gardens and memorable celebrations—all in one welcoming destination.
home.introTitle: Hospitality with heart, moments made beautifully.
home.introText: Highbury Lounge brings together restful accommodation, flexible conference spaces, generous food and tranquil gardens in the heart of Kadoma.
home.stayTitle: Rooms designed for an easy stay.
home.stayNote: Choose the room style that best suits your stay. Rates are shown per night.
home.meetTitle: A smart setting for meetings that matter.
home.meetText: From focused team sessions to workshops and corporate functions, our adaptable venue gives every gathering the room, service and calm it needs.
home.conferenceTitle: A professional space for every agenda.
home.conferenceNote: Choose a setup and speak to our team about dates, catering and equipment.
home.celebrateTitle: Beautiful spaces for your biggest moments.
home.celebrateText: Weddings, birthdays, graduations and private events, made memorable in our garden venue.
home.dineText: Start the day with breakfast, enjoy a satisfying lunch or gather over dinner. Our kitchen serves familiar favourites with a fresh local touch.
home.galleryTitle: Come for the stay. Remember the feeling.
home.contactTitle: Ready to make yourself at home?
home.contactText: Book a room, request a conference quote or start planning your next celebration.
home.whatsappAria: Chat with Highbury Lounge on WhatsApp
